raw_consumer_statement: I searched for a medical provider online and encountered many that disclosed nonrefundable fees. Eventually I found XXXX and in the screening process their system said I was approved and prompted me to input my shipping address and credit card info. My card was then charged and I was forced to go to another portal to fill out a medical intake form where it was apparent I did not qualify. I did not submit the medical intake form. There was no option to cancel or withdraw my order. I immediately tried to dispute the charge and emailed the company to cancel the transaction. They refused and stated that they hold {$100.00} for processing medical intake which I did not submit. Citibank denied my dispute even through I received no goods or services and did not submit any medical intake or medical forms.
